improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners, traders, and professionals. Try Gideon free, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://your-domain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://your-domain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A well-crafted meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating the value proposition. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the page is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or messaging apps—critical for a B2B audience. Including the free trial and starting price builds trust and sets expectations before the click.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product name and core function, building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the risk-free trial offer. 'No card required' removes friction and builds trust, encouraging visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing Gideon. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly, or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium-to-paid model—what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition and reinforcing the low entry price plus savings opportunity, it reduces uncertainty and encourages conversion while staying fully accurate to the stated pricing structure.
